name: Lychee Sorbet
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Fresh lychee fruit (peeled and pitted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the lychee fruit in a blender.
2. Add the sugar and orange juice to the pureed lychee and churn according to the ice-cream maker's instructions.
3. Puree the raspberries in a blender.
4. Strain the raspberry puree through a fine-mesh strainer into a small bowl.
5. Mix the strained raspberry puree with the added sugar.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
To serve:
1. Make a pool of the raspberry sauce on a small plate.
2. Add the sorbet in the center.
